CustomField.description: Projected number of months the scoping phase will exceed the agency baseline. Computed by NEPA_Timeline_Risk_Assessor as: (nepa_days_in_current_stage__c / 30) − Scoping_Cap_Months__c. Negative values indicate on-track.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Months by which current scoping duration exceeds the agency-specific baseline cap. Negative = on track.
CustomField.label: Projected Scoping Overrun (Months)
